bugs.title: GraphQL — addOrUpdateCartShipment ApolloError on cart load
bugs.notes: ApolloError: 'Error trying to resolve field addOrUpdateCartShipment'. Consistent with BUG-042-001. Mutation fails when cart shipment update attempted. Related to VCST-4710 address/shipment changes.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart query returns current cart
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP cart] Cart query returns: id, name, items (productId, name, quantity, price), total, subTotal. Cart contains Pressure Cooker Gas Cooker ($99.99, qty 999). Response structure matches graphql-schema.md.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart items with full field selection
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP cart] Full field selection: items { id, name, sku, quantity, price { amount, formattedAmount }, product { id, name, imgSrc } }. All fields return non-null values per full-field-selection policy (feedback_graphql_full_field_selection.md).

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart discounts and promotions
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP cart] Discounts field: automatic -$0.01 discount from automatic promotion. Coupon list: 4 available coupons. discounts { amount, description, promotionId }. BestRewardPromotionPolicy applied.

testCases.title: GraphQL — addItem mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC addItem] Mutation: addItem(command: { cartId, productId, quantity }) returns updated cart. Item addition reflected in cart.items. Cart total recalculated after addItem.

testCases.title: GraphQL — changeCartItemQuantity mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC changeCartItemQuantity] Quantity update mutation executes successfully. Cart total recalculates on quantity change. Response returns updated cart with new quantity.

testCases.title: GraphQL — removeCartItem mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC removeCartItem] Item removal mutation executes. Cart items list updated post-removal. Cart total recalculated. Idempotent — removing non-existent item returns clean cart.

testCases.title: GraphQL — addOrUpdateCartShipment mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC addOrUpdateCartShipment] FAILED: ApolloError 'Error trying to resolve field addOrUpdateCartShipment'. Consistent with BUG-042-001 and storefront console error. Mutation fails server-side. Related to VCST-4710 shipment/address changes. Filed as BUG-050b2-001 (cross-ref BUG-042-001).

testCases.title: GraphQL — validateCart query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP validateCart] Cart validation returns validation errors list. Empty errors list for valid cart. Per graphql-schema.md: validationErrors { errorCode, errorMessage, objectId }.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart shipments query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP cart] Shipments field: BOPIS shipment with deliveryAddress (Delancey St & Essex St, Michigan, 10094). Shipment method: pickup. Price $0.00 (BL-SHIP-002). Shipment fields returned per schema.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart payments query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP cart] Payments field: available payment methods. paymentGatewayCode: cybersource, authorize-net, datatrans, skyflow, manual. All 5 payment methods in GraphQL response.

testCases.title: GraphQL — addCoupon mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC addCoupon] Coupon code application mutation available. Returns updated cart with applied coupon. Discount recalculated per BestRewardPromotionPolicy. Schema validated.

testCases.title: GraphQL — removeCoupon mutation
testCases.notes: [GQL-EXEC removeCoupon] Coupon removal mutation reverts cart to automatic promotion only. Discount recalculates to -$0.01 automatic. Cart total returns to pre-coupon value.

testCases.title: GraphQL — createOrderFromCart mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: createOrderFromCart requires valid payment method with credentials. Cannot place order without CyberSource test card or other valid payment. Mutation structure verified via introspection.

testCases.title: GraphQL — addOrUpdateCartPayment mutation
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: addOrUpdateCartPayment with CyberSource gateway token requires payment form submission. Token not obtainable without CyberSource test card. Schema introspection confirms mutation signature.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart address update (VCST-4710)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Address update via GraphQL (addOrUpdateCartAddress) related to VCST-4710 address facets. Shipment address mutation fails (BUG-050b2-001). Full address update flow not executable.

testCases.title: GraphQL — mergeCart mutation
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: mergeCart (guest + authenticated) mutation deferred. Guest cart creation required as prerequisite. Cart merge not executed in B2B authenticated session.

testCases.title: GraphQL — clearCart mutation
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: clearCart mutation deferred to preserve test cart state. Cart with Pressure Cooker needed for downstream suite assertions.

testCases.title: GraphQL — cart schema introspection
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP __type] Schema introspection for CartType: all fields present per graphql-schema.md. CartType includes items, shipments, payments, discounts, validationErrors, addresses. Schema version matches expected fields.
